verses.latin_vulgate: Audite hæc, domus Jacob,  qui vocamini nomine Israël,  et de aquis Juda existis ;  qui juratis in nomine Domini,  et Dei Israël recordamini  non in veritate neque in justitia.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שִׁמְעוּ־זֹ֣את בֵּֽית־יַעֲקֹ֗ב הַנִּקְרָאִים֙ בְּשֵׁ֣ם יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל וּמִמֵּ֥י יְהוּדָ֖ה יָצָ֑אוּ הַֽנִּשְׁבָּעִ֣ים ׀ בְּשֵׁ֣ם יְהֹוָ֗ה וּבֵאלֹהֵ֤י יִשְׂרָאֵל֙ יַזְכִּ֔ירוּ לֹ֥א בֶאֱמֶ֖ת וְלֹ֥א בִצְדָקָֽה׃
verses.king_james: Hear ye this, O house of Jacob, which are called by the name of Israel, and are come forth out of the waters of Judah, which swear by the name of the Lord, and make mention of the God of Israel, but not in truth, nor in righteousness.

verses.latin_vulgate: De civitate enim sancta vocati sunt,  et super Deum Israël constabiliti sunt :  Dominus exercituum nomen ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּֽי־מֵעִ֤יר הַקֹּ֙דֶשׁ֙ נִקְרָ֔אוּ וְעַל־אֱלֹהֵ֥י יִשְׂרָאֵ֖ל נִסְמָ֑כוּ יְהֹוָ֥ה צְבָא֖וֹת שְׁמֽוֹ׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: For they call themselves of the holy city, and stay themselves upon the God of Israel; The Lord of hosts is his name.

verses.latin_vulgate: Priora ex tunc annuntiavi,  et ex ore meo exierunt, et audita feci ea :  repente operatus sum, et venerunt.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הָרִֽאשֹׁנוֹת֙ מֵאָ֣ז הִגַּ֔דְתִּי וּמִפִּ֥י יָצְא֖וּ וְאַשְׁמִיעֵ֑ם פִּתְאֹ֥ם עָשִׂ֖יתִי וַתָּבֹֽאנָה׃
verses.king_james: I have declared the former things from the beginning; and they went forth out of my mouth, and I shewed them; I did them suddenly, and they came to pass.

verses.latin_vulgate: Scivi enim quia durus es tu,  et nervus ferreus cervix tua,  et frons tua ærea.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מִדַּעְתִּ֕י כִּ֥י קָשֶׁ֖ה אָ֑תָּה וְגִ֤יד בַּרְזֶל֙ עׇרְפֶּ֔ךָ וּמִצְחֲךָ֖ נְחוּשָֽׁה׃
verses.king_james: Because I knew that thou art obstinate, and thy neck is an iron sinew, and thy brow brass;

verses.latin_vulgate: Prædixi tibi ex tunc ;  antequam venirent, indicavi tibi,  ne forte diceres : Idola mea fecerunt hæc,  et sculptilia mea et conflatilia mandaverunt ista.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וָאַגִּ֤יד לְךָ֙ מֵאָ֔ז בְּטֶ֥רֶם תָּב֖וֹא הִשְׁמַעְתִּ֑יךָ פֶּן־תֹּאמַר֙ עׇצְבִּ֣י עָשָׂ֔ם וּפִסְלִ֥י וְנִסְכִּ֖י צִוָּֽם׃
verses.king_james: I have even from the beginning declared it to thee; before it came to pass I shewed it thee: lest thou shouldest say, Mine idol hath done them, and my graven image, and my molten image, hath commanded them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quæ audisti, vide omnia ;  vos autem, num annuntiastis ?  Audita feci tibi nova ex tunc,  et conservata sunt quæ nescis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שָׁמַ֤עְתָּֽ חֲזֵה֙ כֻּלָּ֔הּ וְאַתֶּ֖ם הֲל֣וֹא תַגִּ֑ידוּ הִשְׁמַעְתִּ֤יךָ חֲדָשׁוֹת֙ מֵעַ֔תָּה וּנְצֻר֖וֹת וְלֹ֥א יְדַעְתָּֽם׃
verses.king_james: Thou hast heard, see all this; and will not ye declare it? I have shewed thee new things from this time, even hidden things, and thou didst not know them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Nunc creata sunt et non ex tunc ;  et ante diem, et non audisti ea,  ne forte dicas : Ecce ego cognovi ea.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עַתָּ֤ה נִבְרְאוּ֙ וְלֹ֣א מֵאָ֔ז וְלִפְנֵי־י֖וֹם וְלֹ֣א שְׁמַעְתָּ֑ם פֶּן־תֹּאמַ֖ר הִנֵּ֥ה יְדַעְתִּֽין׃
verses.king_james: They are created now, and not from the beginning; even before the day when thou heardest them not; lest thou shouldest say, Behold, I knew them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Neque audisti, neque cognovisti,  neque ex tunc aperta est auris tua :  scio enim quia prævaricans prævaricaberis,  et transgressorem ex utero vocavi te.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: גַּ֣ם לֹֽא־שָׁמַ֗עְתָּ גַּ֚ם לֹ֣א יָדַ֔עְתָּ גַּ֕ם מֵאָ֖ז לֹא־פִתְּחָ֣ה אׇזְנֶ֑ךָ כִּ֤י יָדַ֙עְתִּי֙ בָּג֣וֹד תִּבְגּ֔וֹד וּפֹשֵׁ֥עַ מִבֶּ֖טֶן קֹ֥רָא לָֽךְ׃
verses.king_james: Yea, thou heardest not; yea, thou knewest not; yea, from that time that thine ear was not opened: for I knew that thou wouldest deal very treacherously, and wast called a transgressor from the womb.

verses.latin_vulgate: Propter nomen meum longe faciam furorem meum,  et laude mea infrenabo te,  ne intereas.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְמַ֤עַן שְׁמִי֙ אַאֲרִ֣יךְ אַפִּ֔י וּתְהִלָּתִ֖י אֶחֱטׇם־לָ֑ךְ לְבִלְתִּ֖י הַכְרִיתֶֽךָ׃
verses.king_james: For my name’s sake will I defer mine anger, and for my praise will I refrain for thee, that I cut thee not off.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ecce excoxi te, sed non quasi argentum ;  elegi te in camino paupertatis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הִנֵּ֥ה צְרַפְתִּ֖יךָ וְלֹ֣א בְכָ֑סֶף בְּחַרְתִּ֖יךָ בְּכ֥וּר עֹֽנִי׃
verses.king_james: Behold, I have refined thee, but not with silver; I have chosen thee in the furnace of affliction.

verses.latin_vulgate: Propter me, propter me faciam,  ut non blasphemer ;  et gloriam meam alteri non dabo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְמַעֲנִ֧י לְמַעֲנִ֛י אֶעֱשֶׂ֖ה כִּ֣י אֵ֣יךְ יֵחָ֑ל וּכְבוֹדִ֖י לְאַחֵ֥ר לֹא־אֶתֵּֽן׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: For mine own sake, even for mine own sake, will I do it: for how should my name be polluted? and I will not give my glory unto another.

verses.latin_vulgate: Audi me, Jacob,  et Israël, quem ego voco :  ego ipse, ego primus,  et ego novissimus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שְׁמַ֤ע אֵלַי֙ יַֽעֲקֹ֔ב וְיִשְׂרָאֵ֖ל מְקֹרָאִ֑י אֲנִי־הוּא֙ אֲנִ֣י רִאשׁ֔וֹן אַ֖ף אֲנִ֥י אַחֲרֽוֹן׃
verses.king_james: Hearken unto me, O Jacob and Israel, my called; I am he; I am the first, I also am the last.

verses.latin_vulgate: Manus quoque mea fundavit terram,  et dextera mea mensa est cælos ;  ego vocabo eos,  et stabunt simul.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַף־יָדִי֙ יָ֣סְדָה אֶ֔רֶץ וִימִינִ֖י טִפְּחָ֣ה שָׁמָ֑יִם קֹרֵ֥א אֲנִ֛י אֲלֵיהֶ֖ם יַעַמְד֥וּ יַחְדָּֽו׃
verses.king_james: Mine hand also hath laid the foundation of the earth, and my right hand hath spanned the heavens: when I call unto them, they stand up together.

verses.latin_vulgate: Congregamini, omnes vos, et audite :  quis de eis annuntiavit hæc ?  Dominus dilexit eum, faciet voluntatem suam in Babylone,  et brachium suum in Chaldæis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הִקָּבְצ֤וּ כֻלְּכֶם֙ וּֽשְׁמָ֔עוּ מִ֥י בָהֶ֖ם הִגִּ֣יד אֶת־אֵ֑לֶּה יְהֹוָ֣ה אֲהֵב֔וֹ יַעֲשֶׂ֤ה חֶפְצוֹ֙ בְּבָבֶ֔ל וּזְרֹע֖וֹ כַּשְׂדִּֽים׃
verses.king_james: All ye, assemble yourselves, and hear; which among them hath declared these things? The Lord hath loved him: he will do his pleasure on Babylon, and his arm shall be on the Chaldeans.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ego, ego locutus sum, et vocavi eum ;  adduxi eum, et directa est via ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֲנִ֥י אֲנִ֛י דִּבַּ֖רְתִּי אַף־קְרָאתִ֑יו הֲבִאֹתִ֖יו וְהִצְלִ֥יחַ דַּרְכּֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: I, even I, have spoken; yea, I have called him: I have brought him, and he shall make his way prosperous.

verses.latin_vulgate: Accedite ad me et audite hoc :  non a principio in abscondito locutus sum :  ex tempore antequam fieret, ibi eram :  et nunc Dominus Deus misit me,  et spiritus ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: קִרְב֧וּ אֵלַ֣י שִׁמְעוּ־זֹ֗את לֹ֤א מֵרֹאשׁ֙ בַּסֵּ֣תֶר דִּבַּ֔רְתִּי מֵעֵ֥ת הֱיוֹתָ֖הּ שָׁ֣ם אָ֑נִי וְעַתָּ֗ה אֲדֹנָ֧י יֱהֹוִ֛ה שְׁלָחַ֖נִי וְרוּחֽוֹ׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: Come ye near unto me, hear ye this; I have not spoken in secret from the beginning; from the time that it was, there am I: and now the Lord God, and his Spirit, hath sent me.

verses.latin_vulgate: Hæc dicit Dominus, redemptor tuus,  Sanctus Israël :  Ego Dominus Deus tuus,  docens te utilia,  gubernans te in via qua ambulas.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כֹּה־אָמַ֧ר יְהֹוָ֛ה גֹּאַלְךָ֖ קְד֣וֹשׁ יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל אֲנִ֨י יְהֹוָ֤ה אֱלֹהֶ֙יךָ֙ מְלַמֶּדְךָ֣ לְהוֹעִ֔יל מַדְרִֽיכְךָ֖ בְּדֶ֥רֶךְ תֵּלֵֽךְ׃
verses.king_james: Thus saith the Lord, thy Redeemer, the Holy One of Israel; I am the Lord thy God which teacheth thee to profit, which leadeth thee by the way that thou shouldest go.

verses.latin_vulgate: Utinam attendisses mandata mea :  facta fuisset sicut flumen pax tua,  et justitia tua sicut gurgites maris :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: ל֥וּא הִקְשַׁ֖בְתָּ לְמִצְוֺתָ֑י וַיְהִ֤י כַנָּהָר֙ שְׁלוֹמֶ֔ךָ וְצִדְקָתְךָ֖ כְּגַלֵּ֥י הַיָּֽם׃
verses.king_james: O that thou hadst hearkened to my commandments! then had thy peace been as a river, and thy righteousness as the waves of the sea:

verses.latin_vulgate: et fuisset quasi arena semen tuum,  et stirps uteri tui ut lapilli ejus ;  non interisset et non fuisset attritum  nomen ejus a facie mea.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְהִ֤י כַחוֹל֙ זַרְעֶ֔ךָ וְצֶאֱצָאֵ֥י מֵעֶ֖יךָ כִּמְעֹתָ֑יו לֹא־יִכָּרֵ֧ת וְֽלֹא־יִשָּׁמֵ֛ד שְׁמ֖וֹ מִלְּפָנָֽי׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: Thy seed also had been as the sand, and the offspring of thy bowels like the gravel thereof; his name should not have been cut off nor destroyed from before me.

verses.latin_vulgate: Egredimini de Babylone, fugite a Chaldæis,  in voce exsultationis annuntiate :  auditum facite hoc,  et efferte illud usque ad extrema terræ.  Dicite : Redemit Dominus  servum suum Jacob.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: צְא֣וּ מִבָּבֶל֮ בִּרְח֣וּ מִכַּשְׂדִּים֒ בְּק֣וֹל רִנָּ֗ה הַגִּ֤ידוּ הַשְׁמִ֙יעוּ֙ זֹ֔את הוֹצִיא֖וּהָ עַד־קְצֵ֣ה הָאָ֑רֶץ אִמְר֕וּ גָּאַ֥ל יְהֹוָ֖ה עַבְדּ֥וֹ יַעֲקֹֽב׃
verses.king_james: Go ye forth of Babylon, flee ye from the Chaldeans, with a voice of singing declare ye, tell this, utter it even to the end of the earth; say ye, The Lord hath redeemed his servant Jacob.

verses.latin_vulgate: Non sitierunt in deserto, cum educeret eos :  aquam de petra produxit eis,  et scidit petram, et fluxerunt aquæ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְלֹ֣א צָמְא֗וּ בׇּֽחֳרָבוֹת֙ הוֹלִיכָ֔ם מַ֥יִם מִצּ֖וּר הִזִּ֣יל לָ֑מוֹ וַיִּ֨בְקַע־צ֔וּר וַיָּזֻ֖בוּ מָֽיִם׃
verses.king_james: And they thirsted not when he led them through the deserts: he caused the waters to flow out of the rock for them: he clave the rock also, and the waters gushed out.

verses.latin_vulgate: Non est pax impiis, dicit Dominus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֵ֣ין שָׁל֔וֹם אָמַ֥ר יְהֹוָ֖ה לָרְשָׁעִֽים׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: There is no peace, saith the Lord, unto the wicked.
